name: agri-energy-platform
description: 农光智助·银青共富平台 - 多模态AI驱动的农光互补全年龄段绿色优化助手

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter web dev & pnpm --filter server dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --filter server install && pnpm --filter web install
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter web clean && pnpm --filter server clean && rm -rf node_modules

author: Development Team
